channel.title: Career Advice on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Career Advice on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Is a College Degree Still Worth It in 2026?
item.description: The honest truth about whether a college degree is worth the cost in 2026. We break down the data on earnings, debt, alternatives, and when college makes sense — and when it doesn't.
